sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 7:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 7:1
items.html: It gives to its a branch that stands at the vessel of Keter of the Guf, which is the male of Keter. It also detains the illumination of GAR from expanding to the Partzuf. (Inner Light, Item 40)
